title: ifloga spicata subsp. elbaensis
intro: Ifloga spicata subsp. elbaensis is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae, commonly known as Elba Ifloga or Italian Ifloga. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial properties. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infused in oil for herbal remedies, and it can also be used as a topical application for skin irritations and wounds.
